body.title: Find-it — content router, tries channels by priority
body.result: Content router for D230 reading pipeline. Priority-ordered channel dispatch with short-circuit logic. Stores blobs in cortex, logs failures to watchlist. Tests: 354/354. Committed: a19f5a9.
body.description:
D230. Content router that resolves an acquire request to a blob.

Interface: find_content(title=None, author=None, url=None, file_path=None, research_mode=False) -> content_id

Priority order:
1. FileInboxChannel — if file_path provided (short-circuit, no further search)
2. DirectURLChannel — if url provided (short-circuit, no further search)
3. CalibreChannel — owned local library (free, reliable)
4. GeminiSearchChannel — if research_mode=True or "dig more" requested (free Gemini via browser profile)
5. BrowserUseChannel — last resort (expensive, fragile)

Short-circuit rule: if a channel has short_circuits=True and returns a result, stop immediately.

On success: writes blob to blob-store, returns content_id
On all-channels-fail: logs to watchlist (T-watchlist-notifications), returns failure

File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/find_it.py (new)
Inertia: LOW
Size: S
Depends on: T-channel-registry
